statusPolls.query:
query BulkOperationByIdCapture($id: ID!) {
  bulkOperation(id: $id) {
    
  id
  status
  type
  errorCode
  createdAt
  completedAt
  objectCount
  rootObjectCount
  fileSize
  url
  partialDataUrl
  query

  }
}
